title: palicourea ottonculi
intro: Palicourea ottonculi, also known as "Cipo-branco", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which help to reduce fever, pain, and inflammation. The health benefits of Palicourea ottonculi include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Palicourea ottonculi can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are typically consumed after being strained and served hot or cold.
